scans.name: High RS Momentum
scans.description: Stocks with Relative Strength ≥80 and positive momentum

scans.name: RS New High
scans.description: Relative Strength making new highs (RS ≥90)

scans.name: Momentum Surge
scans.description: Strong 1-week and 1-month returns with volume

scans.name: Triple Momentum
scans.description: Positive returns across all timeframes (1W, 1M, 3M)

scans.name: 52W High Breakout
scans.description: Stocks at or near 52-week high with volume confirmation

scans.name: Breakout + Volume
scans.description: Price breakout (>3%) with 2x average volume

scans.name: Range Breakout
scans.description: Breaking out of 20-day trading range

scans.name: SMA Breakout
scans.description: Price crossing above all major SMAs (20, 50, 200)

scans.name: Gap Up Buy
scans.description: Gap up >3% with volume - potential continuation

scans.name: VCP (Volatility Contraction)
scans.description: Mark Minervini's VCP - decreasing volatility with price support

scans.name: Tight Flag Pattern
scans.description: Tight consolidation after uptrend (flag pattern)

scans.name: Cup & Handle Setup
scans.description: Near highs after recovery (cup) with tight range (handle)

scans.name: Inside Bar
scans.description: Today's range within yesterday's range (consolidation)

scans.name: NR7 (Narrow Range 7)
scans.description: Narrowest range of last 7 days - breakout imminent

scans.name: Tight Consolidation
scans.description: 5-day price range less than 5%

scans.name: Low Volatility Squeeze
scans.description: Volatility at multi-week lows - expansion expected

scans.name: Base Building
scans.description: Flat base formation with support

scans.name: Techno-Funda Quality
scans.description: High RS + Strong fundamentals (ROE>15, D/E<1, positive momentum)

scans.name: Funda-Tech Breakout
scans.description: Strong fundamentals + Price breakout pattern

scans.name: Growth + Momentum
scans.description: High EPS growth with price momentum

scans.name: Value + Momentum
scans.description: Undervalued stocks gaining momentum (Low PE + High RS)

scans.name: CANSLIM Setup
scans.description: O'Neil's CANSLIM criteria met with technical setup

scans.name: Buffett + Momentum
scans.description: Quality moat stocks with price strength

scans.name: Volume Explosion
scans.description: 3x+ average volume with price gain

scans.name: Accumulation Day
scans.description: Price up with above-average volume (institutional buying)

scans.name: Pocket Pivot
scans.description: Volume spike within base (Gil Morales pattern)

scans.name: Dry-Up Volume
scans.description: Very low volume - potential breakout setup

scans.name: Oversold Bounce
scans.description: RSI recovering from oversold with price uptick

scans.name: Bullish Reversal
scans.description: Downtrend reversing with volume

scans.name: 52W Low Bounce
scans.description: Bouncing from 52-week lows with fundamentals intact

scans.name: 200 SMA Reclaim
scans.description: Price reclaiming 200-day SMA from below

scans.name: Gap Fill Long
scans.description: Gap down filled and reclaimed

scans.name: Earnings Breakout
scans.description: Strong post-earnings momentum

scans.name: EPS Acceleration
scans.description: Accelerating quarterly EPS growth

scans.name: Positive Earnings Surprise
scans.description: Beat estimates with price reaction
